user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Godiva
Product type: Dark Chocolate Truffles
Tone: luxurious, indulgent, elegant
Visual style: Rich, dark hues with gold accents and close-up shots highlighting the smooth texture and glossy finish of the truffles.
Conceptual technique: sensory indulgence storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: A Moment of Pure Temptation
brief.caption: A luxurious setting with a velvet-draped table where a golden tray holds an assortment of Godiva dark chocolate truffles, each glistening under soft, ambient lighting. A delicate hand reaches into the frame to select one, capturing the indulgent moment of anticipation.
brief.visual_style: Rich, dark hues with gold accents and close-up shots highlighting the smooth texture and glossy finish of the truffles.
brief.typography_style: Elegant serif with high contrast, reminiscent of luxury branding
brief.color_scheme: deep cocoa brown, shimmering gold, and creamy ivory
